1.0.0.en: Initial release. Integrate Vevor YT60307 weather station via Tuya Cloud API. Supports indoor/outdoor temperature, humidity, wind speed, wind direction, rainfall, pressure, UV index, light intensity and pool temperature.

1.0.1.en: Fixed certification issues: updated readme, added support URL, new driver icon and images showing the weather station.

1.0.2.en: Fixed driver icon, app icon and replaced driver images with real product photo.

1.0.3.en: — Changelog: Fixed driver icon, app icon and replaced driver images with real product photo.
